{"subject": "Quick thought on Stripe's Stripe's announcement of 288 products at", "body": "Hi William,

Saw that Stripe Stripe's announcement of 288 products at Sessions 2026 focused on agentic commerce, AI wallets for 250M+ consumers, and Google Gemini integration. Congrats - that kind of momentum is exactly when GTM infrastructure becomes the bottleneck.

GTM Prospect Agent researching companies building AI-driven commerce infrastructure

I built something that might be relevant - an AI-native layer that sits on top of your data and helps your reps spend time on the right accounts at the right moment, with context they'd otherwise miss.

Worth a 20-min call to see if there's a fit?

Best,
Abhishek
"}
